title: Reproductive Cloning : A Re-expression of Maternal Genome
author: Rishabh Garg
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Cloning represents a novel reproduction alternative to produce an exact replica of the mother. However, it is deliberate production of genetically identical copy of an individual that does not allow new combinations to form and consequently triggers chances of uncontrolled gene expression in offspring. 

 Each newly produced individual is a vegetative clone of the original. Clones contain identical sets of DNA, more precisely genes, in their nuclei.

keywords: Blue-print of life, DNA cloning, Genetic copy, Genome, Vegetative production
